Title: My Partner Launched Clear Within This Year And Now Takes Every Call With The Supplement Bottle Right There
Original Company: Clear Within
Total Runtime: 00:08
Target Product: Clear Skin Vitamin

🔗 Source video: https://www.tiktok.com/t/ZTSeXkJUK/

🎬 HERO SHOT LIST — your filming bible

Shoot smart: This is a silent observational piece with one on-screen caption throughout. Record no dialogue—just capture authentic B-roll of someone working with the Clear Skin Vitamin visible in frame. Film all shots in one continuous setup (same location/wardrobe), holding each framing for the specified duration. Editor will use the full 8-second take with caption overlay.

# Time 🎙️ Voice & what you say 🎬 What to shoot 🖼️ Ref 📦 Group
1 00:00–00:01 Silent B-roll · no dialogue Person at home workspace, laptop open, Clear Within bottle prominent in frame, focused on work A · Home desk setup
2 00:01–00:04 Silent B-roll · no dialogue Continue same framing—person working, hand near face in thought, Clear Within bottle visible A · Home desk setup
3 00:04–00:04 Silent B-roll · no dialogue Same continuous shot—maintain observational framing, product stays in frame A · Home desk setup
4 00:04–00:08 Silent B-roll · no dialogue Final hold of same scene—person engaged in work, Clear Within bottle consistently visible A · Home desk setup

🎯 Shoot order (batch by setup — film top to bottom)

  1. Group A · Home desk setup (kitchen counter or home office, laptop, Clear Within bottle, optional flowers/drink for warmth) → Film one continuous 8-second take covering Shots 1–4, person naturally working at laptop with product bottle prominently placed in frame

Step 2: Reworked Script

Original Beat Original Copy Clear Within Reworked Copy Compliance Notes
Opening hook + sustained observation "my boyf started a company this year and now he takes every single call wearing a hat with his own logo on it 🥹" (sustained caption throughout entire video while showing continuous B-roll of boyfriend working at laptop wearing branded cap) "my partner launched clear within this year and now takes every single call with the supplement bottle sitting right there on the desk 🥹" (sustained caption throughout entire video while showing continuous B-roll of partner working at laptop with Clear Skin Vitamin bottle prominently visible in frame) ✅ Product shown as part of daily routine, not making efficacy claims. Reframes "branded hat" device to "product bottle as constant presence"—same devotion/belief hook, our words.

Shot 1 · Opening hook · 00:00–00:01

Inspo reference:

Element What to do
🎙️ VO / dialogue none
💬 On-screen caption my partner launched clear within this year and now takes every single call with the supplement bottle sitting right there on the desk 🥹
🎬 Visual / action A person (your partner or talent playing the role) is seated at a light-colored kitchen counter or home office desk, focused on an open laptop. They're dressed casually in a plain t-shirt, hand resting near their mouth in concentration. The Clear Skin Vitamin bottle is prominently placed on the desk surface to their left or right—clearly visible, not hidden. Optional warm touches in frame: a drink carton, a vase of fresh flowers, clean modern kitchen or office background (white cabinets, minimal backsplash, neutral tones). The person is genuinely working, not posing—captured in their element.
📷 Camera / shot style iPhone UGC static shot, medium framing centered on the person at their workspace. Hold the frame steady—this is observational, like someone quietly filming their partner at work. Moderately shallow depth of field to keep the person and Clear Within bottle in sharp focus while gently blurring the background.
✨ Effects / animation Small crying-face emoji (🥹) overlaid on the caption text, positioned naturally near the text.
🎵 Music / sound Sentimental, heartwarming instrumental track—light and melodic, possibly ukulele or acoustic guitar. Tender, appreciative mood. Optional subtle cat meow sound effects layered in softly for charm.
🎨 Aesthetic / grade Bright, clean modern home aesthetic with soft, even natural lighting—no harsh shadows, just gentle illumination that makes the space feel inviting and real. Slightly warm color grade emphasizing neutral tones with vibrant accents (flowers, drink carton if present). Crisp, clear image with good detail and no visible grain. The moderately shallow depth of field creates intimacy and focus on the subject and product. The overall mood is tender, proud, and quietly supportive—someone capturing their partner's entrepreneurial dedication with affectionate admiration. This isn't a staged ad; it's a genuine life moment where the Clear Within bottle has become a constant companion.

Element What to do
🎙️ VO / dialogue none

The Clear Skin Vitamin bottle stays visible in the same position on the desk. If flowers and drink are in frame, they remain. Same framing, same setting. This is one long, unbroken observational take—the camera just keeps rolling, capturing authentic work in progress.
📷 Camera / shot style iPhone UGC static shot, same medium framing. Continue holding steady—no movement, no zoom, no adjustment. The static framing reinforces the documentary-like quality, as if we're quietly watching someone in their zone.
✨ Effects / animation The crying-face emoji (🥹) remains overlaid on the caption in the same position.
🎵 Music / sound The sentimental instrumental continues uninterrupted, maintaining the heartwarming, appreciative mood.
🎨 Aesthetic / grade Identical to Shot 1—bright, clean modern interior with soft natural light and slightly warm color grade. The static framing and continued focus create an intimate, authentic feeling. The shallow depth of field keeps the person and Clear Within bottle sharp while the background stays softly blurred, reinforcing the sense of a real, lived-in space. The aesthetic conveys genuine pride and belief through its unpolished, candid capture—this is someone so committed to their product that it's become part of their daily routine.

Element What to do

The Clear Skin Vitamin bottle is clearly visible throughout. The flowers (if present), drink carton (if present), and modern kitchen or office background remain in frame. No change in positioning or action—this is the natural conclusion of one long observational take.

The slightly warm color grade emphasizes the cozy, supportive domestic setting. The static, observational framing throughout all beats conveys authenticity—this is genuine daily life where the Clear Skin Vitamin has become so integral to the routine that it's always there, a quiet testament to belief in the product. The overall aesthetic tells a story of pride, dedication, and real commitment to supporting clear skin from within—not through loud claims, but through the simple visual detail of someone who keeps their supplement close because they truly believe in what it does.

📋 Shoot Checklist

Talent

  • [ ] 1 person (partner/founder figure or talent playing the role)—someone comfortable being filmed naturally while working, not performing

Locations

  • [ ] Home kitchen counter or home office desk with clean, modern background
  • [ ] Good natural light from window (soft, even—avoid harsh direct sun)

Props

  • [ ] Laptop (open, positioned so talent can genuinely work/focus on it)
  • [ ] Clear Skin Vitamin bottle (hero product—must be prominently visible throughout)
  • [ ] Optional: drink carton (red or colorful for visual warmth)
  • [ ] Optional: vase of fresh flowers (pink/white or similar soft colors)
  • [ ] Optional: white paper towel roll or minimal kitchen items for lived-in authenticity

Wardrobe

  • [ ] Casual, comfortable clothing—plain t-shirt in neutral or soft color (grey, white, navy)
  • [ ] No logos, patterns, or distractions—keep focus on the scene and product

Technical

  • [ ] iPhone or similar camera capable of shallow depth of field (Portrait mode or equivalent)
  • [ ] Tripod or stable surface for static framing (no handheld shake)
  • [ ] Sentimental, heartwarming instrumental track (ukulele/acoustic guitar mood)
  • [ ] Optional: "So cute!" vocal samples (2x) and subtle cat meow sound effects
  • [ ] Crying-face emoji graphic (🥹) for caption overlay
  • [ ] Video editing software for caption overlay, emoji placement, and music sync

Filming Notes

  • [ ] This is ONE continuous 8-second take—no cuts, just one long observational shot
  • [ ] Talent should genuinely focus on laptop work (emails, spreadsheet, etc.)—not looking at camera
  • [ ] Position Clear Within bottle prominently in frame but naturally (on desk surface, not held)
  • [ ] Frame medium shot, centered on talent, with product clearly visible to one side
  • [ ] Hold framing steady throughout—no pans, zooms, or movement
  • [ ] Capture authentic concentration/thought (hand near face, focused expression)
  • [ ] Aim for soft, even natural light—avoid harsh shadows or overexposure
  • [ ] Let the scene breathe—this should feel like quietly watching someone in their element, not a staged ad

Individual results vary. These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
